title: Wepisia: Open Epidemiology Platform Built for Africa
description: A complete architectural rewrite of OpenEpi built with React 18, TypeScript, and Vite. Features 19 OpenEpi-validated biostatistics modules, multi-region epidemic simulation (SIR/SEIR/SEIRD/SEIQRD), interactive geospatial mapping, an in-browser R IDE via WebAssembly, PubMed explorer, and multilingual support including Mooré, Wolof, Swahili, and Haoussa. Fully client-side — no server, no data collection. Built for public health practitioners in Africa.
